## What does this PR do?

<!-- e.g. Adds the Linear for Startups program; corrects the Vercel redeem link -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Program YAML follows `src/program.schema.json` (`bun run validate:data` passes)
- [ ] `url` is the **official** program page — no affiliate or referral links
- [ ] This is a **builder / dev-adjacent** perk (not a consumer/lifestyle discount)
- [ ] `audience` lists **every** persona the program serves
- [ ] `verified` is the date I confirmed the offer (honest, not post-dated)
- [ ] `bun run check` and `bun run build` pass locally
